natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc with errors like 'class optiling::Ca6k00213CustomTilingData' has no member named 'set_totalLength', do not use setter methods (set_totalLength, set_tileLength, etc.) on the tiling data object; instead assign directly to the fields (e.g., tiling.totalLength = totalLength).
